F001.evidence: toDoc closures moved to useRef; useReconcile unwraps via isRef() at timer-fire time

F002.evidence: getIndexedIds() seeds per-table snap refs from already-indexed state at first mount

F003.evidence: Notes.tsx uses useUnifiedSearchIndex hook with substring content/tags fallback when !ready

D-HIGH-1.evidence: command.tsx has no explicit role='listbox' or role='option'; cmdk sets them

D-HIGH-2.evidence: Show-all row has aria-expanded + ChevronDown/ChevronRight icon + expansion label

D-HIGH-3.evidence: Badge aria-label removed; CommandItem has aria-label composed of displayTitle, type

D-HIGH-4.evidence: min-h-[44px] on result rows, show-all rows, static-page rows, empty-placeholder rows, Clear button

D-MED-1.evidence: Pluralized '1 result' / 'N results'; 400ms settle on announcedCount independent of 150ms search debounce

D-MED-2.evidence: contentClassName has max-sm:inset-0 max-sm:max-w-full max-sm:h-full max-sm:rounded-none (full-screen below 640px)

D-MED-3.evidence: handleCommandKeyDown intercepts Home/End and dispatches mousemove on first/last [cmdk-item]:not([data-disabled='true'])

D-MED-4.evidence: Authors.tsx adds Clear X button with aria-label='Clear search' and 44px touch target

D-MED-5.evidence: TYPE_BADGE_CLASS maps each EntityType to distinct theme-token classes (brand-soft, success-soft, warning, muted, success, secondary)

D-MED-6.evidence: Empty sections render a disabled placeholder 'Heading — no matches' when anyEntityHits is true
